title: pelargonium × fasciculatum
intro: Pelargonium × fasciculatum, also known as Rose-scented Geranium, is a species of flowering plant that is native to South Africa and is a hybrid of Pelargonium capitatum and Pelargonium cordifolium. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which make it effective in treating a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Rose-scented Geranium include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause and PMS. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
